tasks.subject: Task 0: R11 브랜치 + spec §10 R11 체크리스트 확장 + plan + tasks.json + Decision Log
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `rolestra-phase-r11` 브랜치는 main tip(`dc4a763`)에서 이미 분기됨. spec §10 Phase R11 블록을 R3~R10 템플릿(체크박스 + 산출물 링크)으로 확장 — 16 구현 체크박스 + closeout 1개 + scope 경계. Decision Log 9건(D1~D9) 기록. tasks.json 17-slot skeleton.

**Files:** docs/plans/2026-04-26-rolestra-phase-r11.md, docs/plans/2026-04-26-rolestra-phase-r11.md.tasks.json, docs/specs/2026-04-18-rolestra-design.md (§10 Phase R11)

**Verify:** `git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD` == rolestra-phase-r11

tasks.subject: Task 2: v2 engine 6 파일 + 7 @ts-nocheck + LEGACY_V2_CHANNELS 27개 일괄 청소
tasks.description:
**Goal:** spec §10 R10 scope 경계 line 1327 R11 이연. v2 engine 6 파일 (orchestrator/turn-executor/conversation/execution-coordinator/memory-coordinator/persona-builder) + 동명 __tests__ 16개 + chat/conversation/consensus IPC handler + 동명 tests + smoke-v3-di + consensus-driver 일괄 삭제. workspace-handler 를 service-singleton(workspaceService + consensusFolderService) 모듈로 단순화 (v2 PermissionService 인스턴스 + ensureAccessWithApproval + IPC 6개 삭제). permission-handler 를 R10 PermissionFlagBuilder dry-run only 로 단순화 (v2 IPC 4개 + requestPermissionApproval + accessor 삭제). router.ts: LEGACY_V2_CHANNELS Set + warnOnceLegacy + 27 v2 IPC + permission v2 IPC 4개 등록 모두 제거. ipc-types.ts: 31개 v2 type def 제거. ipc-schemas.ts: v2 critical schema 5개 제거. legacy-channel-isolation.test.ts 삭제. 4개 handler test 갱신. members/persona-permission-rules.ts 신규 (buildPermissionRules helper). meeting-turn-executor: v2 import 제거, fallback 삭제, memberProfileService required.

**Files:** src/main/engine/* (7+16) DELETE, src/main/ipc/handlers/{chat,conversation,consensus}-handler.ts (+tests) DELETE, src/main/ipc/handlers/{workspace,permission}-handler.ts (재작성), src/main/ipc/router.ts, src/shared/{ipc-types,ipc-schemas}.ts, src/main/index.ts, src/main/meetings/engine/meeting-turn-executor.ts (+test), src/main/members/persona-permission-rules.ts (신규)

**Verify:** `grep -rln '@ts-nocheck' src/` 0 hit && `grep -rln 'LEGACY_V2_CHANNELS' src/` 0 hit && typecheck:node + typecheck:web + build exit 0 && test 회귀 0 (baseline 14 file/66 case → R11 후 13 file/65 case).

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/engine/orchestrator.ts","src/main/engine/turn-executor.ts","src/main/engine/conversation.ts","src/main/engine/execution-coordinator.ts","src/main/engine/memory-coordinator.ts","src/main/engine/persona-builder.ts","src/main/engine/consensus-driver.ts","src/main/ipc/handlers/chat-handler.ts","src/main/ipc/handlers/conversation-handler.ts","src/main/ipc/handlers/consensus-handler.ts","src/main/ipc/handlers/workspace-handler.ts","src/main/ipc/handlers/permission-handler.ts","src/main/ipc/router.ts","src/shared/ipc-types.ts","src/shared/ipc-schemas.ts","src/main/index.ts","src/main/meetings/engine/meeting-turn-executor.ts","src/main/members/persona-permission-rules.ts"],"verifyCommand":"grep -rln @ts-nocheck src && grep -rln LEGACY_V2_CHANNELS src && npm run typecheck:node && npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["v2 engine 6 파일 부재","@ts-nocheck 0 hit","LEGACY_V2_CHANNELS 0 hit","typecheck:node + typecheck:web + build exit 0","test 회귀 0 (baseline 대비 +0)","v3 engine (consensus-machine/meeting-orchestrator/v3-side-effects) 정상 동작"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Pre-existing 14 test file 실패 정리 (database-* / memory-* / recovery-* / remote-* / handlers-v3 ipc)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** R10 Known Concern #8 종결. 14 v2 잔재 테스트를 (a) v3 재작성, (b) `it.skip` + reason, (c) 물리 삭제 셋 중 하나로 처리. `npm run test` exit 0 회복.

**분류:**
- database-* (4) — 마이그레이션 chain 재정합 또는 skip
- memory-* (3) — Phase 3-a (FTS5) 기준 재작성
- recovery-* (2) — v2 모델 → 삭제
- remote-* (3) — Remote v3 재설계 시점까지 skip (R12+)
- handlers-v3 ipc (2) — v3 명세 재정합

**Files:** src/main/database/__tests__/database-*.test.ts, src/main/memory/__tests__/memory-*.test.ts, src/main/recovery/__tests__/recovery-*.test.ts, src/main/remote/__tests__/remote-*.test.ts, src/main/ipc/__tests__/handlers-v3-*.test.ts

**Verify:** `npm run test` exit 0

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/database/__tests__","src/main/memory/__tests__","src/main/recovery/__tests__","src/main/remote/__tests__","src/main/ipc/__tests__"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test","acceptanceCriteria":["14 파일 모두 처리 (재작성/skip/삭제)","npm run test exit 0 baseline 회복","skip 처리 시 모든 skip reason comment + V4/R12+ 라벨"]}
```

**완료 기록 (S1.75 — commit 후 갱신):** Task 2 종료 baseline = 13 fail file / 65 fail case (분류표가 기재한 14 중 `recovery-handler.test.ts` 는 fail 없음 → 13개로 수렴). 처리: (a) 물리 삭제 9 — `database/__tests__/{conversation-repository, database-branch-operations.integration, database-crud-lifecycle.integration, database-migration-chain.integration}.test.ts` + `recovery/__tests__/{recovery-integration, recovery-manager}.test.ts` + `engine/__tests__/session-persistence.integration.test.ts` + `files/__tests__/{permission-revocation-listener, workspace-permission}.test.ts` (모두 v2 conversations / RecoveryManager / SSM / permission flow 직결). (b) skip stub 3 — `memory/__tests__/memory-integration.test.ts` (V4 / Phase 3-b 임베딩+하이브리드 재설계 후 재작성), `remote/__tests__/{remote-integration, remote-utilities}.test.ts` (R12+ Remote Access 재설계 후 재작성). 모두 `describe.skip` + reason comment + V4/R12+ 라벨. (c) v3 재작성 1 — `ipc/__tests__/handlers-v3.test.ts` `message handlers > search` 케이스: R10-Task2 분리 결과 (`search()` SSM 내부용 / `searchWithContext()` UI 용) 반영해 mock + assertion 을 `searchWithContext` 로 정합. **Verify:** `npm run test` exit 0 (229 file passed / 4 skipped — 0 failed; 3070 case passed / 9 skipped — 0 failed; 이전 baseline 13/65 fail → 0/0). typecheck (node + web) exit 0.

tasks.subject: Task 4: Playwright OS matrix 안정화 + search/dm spec + autonomy Step C 활성 + 12 스크린샷
tasks.description:
**Goal:** R10 Known Concerns #1+#2+#3+#6 동시 종결. (a) `e2e/search-flow.spec.ts` + `e2e/dm-flow.spec.ts` 신규, (b) preload `__rolestraDevHooks` ROLESTRA_E2E=1 가드 노출 (tripFilesPerTurn / tripCumulativeCliMs / tripQueueStreak / tripSameError), (c) autonomy-queue Step C 활성 (Circuit Breaker downgrade 시나리오), (d) `.github/workflows/playwright.yml` workflow_dispatch 실 run + 27 cell green 캡처, (e) 12 스크린샷 (6 테마 × 2 surface) Windows + macOS native 캡처, appendix-r10-evidence/screenshots/ 갱신.

**Files:** e2e/search-flow.spec.ts, e2e/dm-flow.spec.ts, e2e/autonomy-queue-flow.spec.ts, src/preload/index.ts, src/main/index.ts, .github/workflows/playwright.yml, docs/specs/appendix/r10-evidence/screenshots/

**Verify:** GitHub Actions workflow_dispatch run — 9 spec × 3 OS = 27 cell green

```json:metadata
{"files":["e2e/search-flow.spec.ts","e2e/dm-flow.spec.ts","e2e/autonomy-queue-flow.spec.ts","src/preload/index.ts",".github/workflows/playwright.yml"],"verifyCommand":"npx playwright test","acceptanceCriteria":["9 spec × 3 OS = 27 matrix cell 모두 green","search-flow + dm-flow spec 추가","autonomy-queue Step C 실 실행","__rolestraDevHooks ROLESTRA_E2E=1 가드","12 스크린샷 Windows + macOS native"]}
```

**완료 기록 (S2 — commit 후 갱신):** (a) e2e/search-flow.spec.ts + e2e/dm-flow.spec.ts 신규 (각 ShellTopBar 검색 진입 / NavRail DM 진입 + provider 선택 + 회의 시작 미렌더 검증). (b) preload `__rolestraDevHooks` 4 trip 메서드 (tripFilesPerTurn/tripCumulativeCliMs/tripQueueStreak/tripSameError) ROLESTRA_E2E=1 일 때만 contextBridge 노출 + e2e/dev-hooks-types.d.ts 타입 선언. (c) src/main/ipc/handlers/dev-hooks-handler.ts 신규 — 4 tripwire 핸들러 + autonomy 다운그레이드 + circuit_breaker approval row + OS 알림 (handleBreakerFired 재현). dev-hooks-handler.test.ts 9 cases. (d) src/shared/ipc-types.ts 채널 추가 + ipc-schemas.ts zod discriminated union. router.ts 가드 등록 (process.env.ROLESTRA_E2E === '1' 일 때만). main/index.ts setDevHooksAccessors 4 service singleton wire. (e) electron-launch.ts ROLESTRA_E2E=1 자동 주입 (E2E 일관성). (f) autonomy-queue-flow.spec.ts Step C 활성 — `__rolestraDevHooks.tripFilesPerTurn(21)` 호출 + toggle data-mode='manual' 검증. (g) playwright.yml 7→9 spec (search-flow + dm-flow 추가) 9 × 3 OS = 27 cell. (h) appendix-r10-evidence/README.md R11 진행 상황 + 12 스크린샷 sign-off Task 16 Closeout 이월 명시. **Verify:** npm run typecheck (node + web) exit 0 + npm run test 230 file/3079 case pass (S1.75 baseline 229/3070 + dev-hooks 9 cases) + lint 3 errors / 38 warnings (baseline 동일, 회귀 0). **Defer:** 27 cell GH Actions 실 run + 12 스크린샷 native 캡처는 R11 Closeout (Task 16) sign-off.

tasks.subject: Task 5: Shared types + 8 신규 IPC + zod + preload + provider-types capability 확장
tasks.description:
**Goal:** R11 신규 도메인 (onboarding/llm cost/approval detail) IPC 경계 shared 확정. 8 신규 채널 (onboarding:get-state/set-state/complete + provider:detect + llm:cost-summary + execution:dry-run-preview + approval:detail-fetch + meeting:voting-history). ProviderCapability union 에 'summarize' 추가. zod round-trip 16+ cases.

tasks.subject: Task 6: Onboarding 정식 wizard — step 3/4/5 + provider:detect + 영구화 + 자동 진입 (D3, migration 013)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** design polish 라운드 2 A 라운드 (step 2 fixture) 위에 정식 5-step 완성. 마이그레이션 013 신규 (D3 — 단일 row CHECK id=1). step 3 (역할 부여 — displayName/role/personality/expertise) + step 4 (권한 — 3 모드 라디오) + step 5 (첫 프로젝트 — kind/slug). first-boot 자동 진입 (App.tsx view='onboarding'). Settings.AboutTab '온보딩 다시 시작' CTA 정식 wire (현재 testid 만). E2E spec onboarding-flow.

**Files:** src/main/database/migrations/013-onboarding-state.ts, src/main/onboarding/{onboarding-service,onboarding-state-repository}.ts, src/main/ipc/handlers/{onboarding,provider}-handler.ts, src/main/index.ts, src/renderer/features/onboarding/{OnboardingPage,onboarding-data,use-onboarding-state}.ts, src/renderer/features/onboarding/steps/{Step3RoleAssignment,Step4Permissions,Step5FirstProject}.tsx, src/renderer/App.tsx, src/renderer/features/settings/tabs/AboutTab.tsx, e2e/onboarding-flow.spec.ts

**Verify:** `npm run test -- onboarding-service Step3 Step4 Step5 OnboardingPage migrations` && first-boot 시뮬

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/database/migrations/013-onboarding-state.ts","src/main/onboarding/onboarding-service.ts","src/renderer/features/onboarding/OnboardingPage.tsx","src/renderer/features/onboarding/steps/Step3RoleAssignment.tsx","src/renderer/features/onboarding/steps/Step4Permissions.tsx","src/renderer/features/onboarding/steps/Step5FirstProject.tsx","src/renderer/App.tsx","e2e/onboarding-flow.spec.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- onboarding","acceptanceCriteria":["첫 부팅 시 view='onboarding' 자동 진입","step 1~5 진행 + 영구화","완료 후 Dashboard 전환 + 재시작 시 reentry 안 함","AboutTab '온보딩 다시 시작' CTA 정식","migration 013 idempotent","E2E spec 1 추가"]}
```

**완료 기록 (S4 — commit 후 갱신):** Migration 013 신규 — `onboarding_state` 단일행 테이블 (`CHECK (id=1)` + `current_step BETWEEN 1 AND 5` + `completed IN (0,1)` + `selections_json TEXT DEFAULT '{}'` + `updated_at INTEGER`). `IF NOT EXISTS` defence-in-depth로 idempotent. `src/main/onboarding/onboarding-state-repository.ts` 신규 — single-row prepared statements + `OnboardingStateCorruptError`로 깨진 JSON blob 명시적 감지. `src/main/onboarding/onboarding-service.ts` 신규 — `getState`/`applyPartial`/`complete`/`reset` 4 메서드 + `mergeOnboardingPartial` pure function (selections field-by-field merge + completed flip은 complete()만 가능 invariant). `src/main/ipc/handlers/onboarding-handler.ts` 신규 — 4 채널 (`onboarding:get-state`/`set-state`/`complete` + `provider:detect`) + accessor 패턴 + `provider:detect`는 registry.listAll() + cli-detect 결합 (CLI binary scan 실패는 silent fallback). `src/main/index.ts` service singleton wire + detection deps 주입. `src/main/ipc/router.ts` 4 신규 채널 등록. 

Renderer: `src/renderer/features/onboarding/use-onboarding-state.ts` 신규 hook — IPC 라운드트립 + bridge 부재 시 (vitest jsdom) FALLBACK_STATE 동기 폴백 + setState-in-effect 회피 위해 `loading` lazy init. `OnboardingPage.tsx` 5-step shell로 리팩토링 — `currentStep` 분기로 step 1 (welcome body) / step 2 (기존 staff grid + summary) / step 3 (Step3RoleAssignment) / step 4 (Step4Permissions) / step 5 (Step5FirstProject) 라우팅 + canProceed 게이트 + Prev step1=onExit / step2-5=walk back. `steps/Step3RoleAssignment.tsx` 신규 — 선택된 provider 별 한 줄 role 입력. `steps/Step4Permissions.tsx` 신규 — 3 모드 (auto/hybrid/approval) 라디오, default 'hybrid'. `steps/Step5FirstProject.tsx` 신규 — kind 라디오 + slug input + path preview. `App.tsx` first-boot probe (`onboarding:get-state` mount-once → `completed=false` 시 setView('onboarding')) + step5 finish hook (`onCompleteWithProject`로 `useProjects.createNew` 위임, kind='new'만, external/imported는 사용자가 후속 ProjectCreateModal에서 처리). `AboutTab.tsx` CTA 정식 wire — `onboarding:set-state({currentStep:1, selections:{}})` 후 setView. 

i18n: ko/en `onboarding.{step1,step3,step4,step5,footer.step1/3/4/5,actions.finish}` populate. `i18next-parser.config.js`에 onboarding subtree-level keepRemoved 패턴 9개 추가 (`steps`, `summary`, `footer`, `step1`, `step3`, `step4`, `step5`, `actions`, `topBar`, `cardLabels` + 4 leaf entries). 동적 키 (`onboarding.steps.${step.key}` / `onboarding.step${N}.{heading,description}` / `onboarding.step4.modes.${mode}.*` / `onboarding.step5.kinds.${option}.*`) 보존.

E2E: `e2e/onboarding-flow.spec.ts` 신규 — 첫 부팅 → step 1~5 진행 → finish → dashboard-hero + reload 후 reentry 없음. `.github/workflows/playwright.yml` 9→10 spec (10 × 3 OS = 30 cell).

신규 테스트:
- `onboarding-service.test.ts` 16 cases — first-boot default 시드, 영구화, applyPartial 부분 patch + completed 무시 + currentStep 클램프, complete one-way + idempotent, reset, migration 013 CHECK 제약 (id≠1 / current_step 범위 / completed 0/1) + idempotent, repository 깨진 JSON blob 명시적 throw, mergeOnboardingPartial pure function.
- `onboarding-handler.test.ts` 9 cases — 3 state channel delegation + accessor null guard + provider:detect 등록된 provider 매핑 + 미등록 CLI augment + 중복 방지 + scanner throw fallback + deps null guard.
- `OnboardingPage.test.tsx` 16 → 25 cases — 기존 step-2 specific case에 advanceToStep2 helper 추가, 신규 step 3/4/5 게이트 + finish 라벨 검증.

Migration 카운트 가드 갱신: `migration-012.test.ts` (`012`가 마지막` → index 11), `schema-008-011.test.ts` (12 → 13).

**Verify:** typecheck (node + web) exit 0 + `npm run test` 234 file passed / 4 skipped — 0 failed (S3 baseline 232 + onboarding-service + onboarding-handler), 3170 case passed / 9 skipped — 0 failed (baseline 3137 + 33 = 16 service + 9 handler + 8 OnboardingPage 추가) + lint 3 errors / 38 warnings (baseline 동일, 회귀 0) + i18n:check parser idempotent (md5 unchanged on second run).

**Defer:** 12 native 스크린샷 sign-off + 30-cell GH Actions 실 run → R11 Closeout (Task 16). provider:detect 결과를 wizard step 2 카드에 반영 (현재는 fixture 우선) → 디자인 polish round 3 (Task 16 sign-off).

tasks.subject: Task 7: Approvals 상세 패널 (design polish 라운드 2 B 이월) + dryRunPreview IPC + filter wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** design polish 라운드 2 B (R11/R12 데이터 layer 의존 backlog 이월) 정식 land. (a) `ExecutionService.dryRunPreview` API (read-only) + `execution:dry-run-preview` IPC, (b) `approval:detail-fetch` 통합 IPC, (c) `meeting:voting-history` IPC, (d) `approval:list({status})` filter wiring (frontend hook 확장), (e) ApprovalDetailPanel + 5 카드 (DetailHeader/ImpactedFiles/DiffPreview/ConsensusContext/ActionBar), (f) ApprovalInboxView list+detail split layout, (g) ApprovalFilterBar onChange wiring. E2E spec approval-detail-flow.

**Files:** src/main/execution/execution-service.ts, src/main/ipc/handlers/{execution,approval,meeting}-handler.ts, src/renderer/features/approvals/{ApprovalInboxView,ApprovalFilterBar,use-approval-detail}.ts, src/renderer/features/approvals/detail/{ApprovalDetailPanel,ApvDetailHeader,ApvImpactedFilesCard,ApvDiffPreviewCard,ApvConsensusContextCard,ApvActionBar}.tsx, e2e/approval-detail-flow.spec.ts

**Verify:** `npm run test -- ApprovalDetailPanel use-approval-detail execution-service`


**완료 기록 (S5 — commit 후 갱신):** ExecutionService.dryRunPreview(approval) — read-only 프로젝션, fs.existsSync 만 호출 (try/catch fallback), `cli_permission` 의 file-write/delete tool name 만 changeKind 산출 (Edit/Write/MultiEdit/NotebookEdit/edit_file/write_file → modified, Delete/delete_file → deleted, 그 외는 empty). 다른 approval kind 는 모두 empty. src/main/meetings/voting-history.ts 신규 — Meeting.stateSnapshotJson → ApprovalConsensusContext (agree→approve, disagree/block→reject, abstain→abstain). 3 IPC handler 등록 — execution-handler `execution:dry-run-preview` (approval lookup → service 위임), approval-handler `approval:detail-fetch` (approval row + dryRunPreview + voting context 단일 round-trip, 각 슬라이스 try/catch), meeting-handler `meeting:voting-history` (read-only). main/index.ts wire — 전용 detailPreviewExecutionService 생성 (arenaRoot 경로, workspace-bound singleton 과 분리해 read-only path 보장). Renderer: useApprovalDetail hook 신규 (cacheKey ref + null mask + lint guard), 5 카드 컴포넌트 (ApvDetailHeader / ApvImpactedFilesCard / ApvDiffPreviewCard / ApvConsensusContextCard / ApvActionBar), ApprovalDetailPanel 루트 (5 카드 컴포지션 + loading/error/empty zero-state). usePendingApprovals 확장 — `statusFilter: 'pending'|'approved'|'rejected'|'all'` 매개변수 + cacheKey `${projectId}|${statusFilter}` + 'all' 은 status WHERE 누락 + 비-pending 시 stream merge skip. ApprovalInboxView split layout — 좌측 list-pane + 우측 detail-pane (md+ 한정 420px), filter onChange 가 selection 도 클리어, row click 으로 selectedApprovalId set, ApprovalStatusBadge 가 row.status 반영 (R11-Task7 이전엔 모두 pending). i18n ko/en `approval.detail.*` (12 leaf 키 + actions/consensus/diffPreview/impactedFiles/header subtree). `extra` 보간 변수로 i18next pluralization 우회. e2e/approval-detail-flow.spec.ts 신규 + playwright.yml 10→11 spec (33 cell). 신규 테스트 71 cases — execution-service dryRunPreview 9, voting-history 8, approval-handler 7, meeting-handler 4, execution-handler 3, use-approval-detail 6, ApvDetailHeader 4, ApvImpactedFilesCard 5, ApvDiffPreviewCard 5, ApvConsensusContextCard 5, ApvActionBar 5, ApprovalDetailPanel 8, ApprovalInboxView R11-Task7 4 (split layout 2 + 갱신된 filter 2). **Verify:** typecheck (node + web) exit 0 + npm run test 244 file passed / 4 skipped — 0 failed (S4 baseline 234 + 10 신규 테스트 파일) + 3241 case passed / 9 skipped — 0 failed (baseline 3170 + 71) + lint 3 errors / 38 warnings (baseline 동일, 회귀 0) + i18n:check parser idempotent (md5 unchanged on second run).

AutonomyDefaultsTab 'LLM 사용량' 섹션 (provider 별 + 추정 USD = 사용자 입력 단가 × 토큰, default 0 — D5).

**완료 기록 (S6 — commit 후 갱신):** Migration 014 (`llm_cost_audit_log` append-only — id AUTOINCREMENT/meeting_id/provider_id/token_in/token_out CHECK >= 0/created_at + 2 indexes idx_provider+idx_meeting + IF NOT EXISTS idempotent). LlmCostRepository (append → entry 반환 / summarize({periodDays?, now?}) → byProvider 토큰 sum 정렬 + estimatedUsd null / recent({limit}) bounded 1..500 / DEFAULT_PERIOD_DAYS=30). LlmCostService (D5 — getPriceMap 매번 호출, USD = totalTokens / 1M × price; price 0/Negative/non-finite/missing 시 null). MeetingSummaryService 확장 — costAuditSink optional, summarize() 후 provider.consumeLastTokenUsage() 호출, 0/0 skip, sink/throw 모두 best-effort warn. MeetingOrchestrator.postMinutes()는 meetingId 인자 forward. llm-handler `llm:cost-summary` (zod periodDays 1..365 optional → service.summary). main/index.ts boot — repository init(getDatabase()) + service create with config getPriceMap accessor + setLlmCostServiceAccessor + meetingSummaryService 에 sink 주입. Router 등록 1 channel. SettingsConfig.llmCostUsdPerMillionTokens (default {}, deepMerge forward-compat). useLlmCostSummary hook (cacheKey ref + null mask + refetch + jsdom safe). AutonomyDefaultsTab LlmCostSection — table + per-provider price input + commit → settings round-trip → refetch. i18n ko/en `llm.cost.*` (12 leaf — title/description/empty/loading/error/periodLabel/priceLabel/priceSave/refresh/estimatedUsdMissing/totalTokens/tableHeader subtree). i18next-parser keepRemoved `^translation:llm\.cost(\..+)?$`. `{{value}}` 보간 (i18next pluralization 우회, R11-Task7 패턴). 신규 50 cases — migration-014 9 + llm-cost-repository 11 + llm-cost-service 6 + meeting-summary-service 8 (token append) + llm-handler 4 + use-llm-cost-summary 6 + AutonomyDefaultsTab 4 + schema-008-011 카운트 갱신 (12→14). **Verify:** typecheck (node + web) exit 0 + npm run test 250 file passed / 4 skipped — 0 failed (S5 baseline 244 + 6 신규: migration-014/llm-cost-repository/llm-cost-service/llm-handler/use-llm-cost-summary/AutonomyDefaultsTab) + 3291 case passed / 9 skipped — 0 failed (baseline 3241 + 50) + lint 3/38 baseline 동일 + i18n:check parser idempotent (md5 unchanged on second run).

tasks.subject: Task 9: 'summarize' capability literal 정식 도입 + provider config 갱신 (R10 Known Concern #7)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** R10 Known Concern #7 종결. ProviderCapability union 에 'summarize' 추가 (Task 5) → meeting-summary-service 의 임시 'streaming' fallback 우회 제거 + 6 provider config (Claude/Codex/Gemini/Anthropic/OpenAI/Local Ollama) capability 명시.

**완료 기록 (S3 — commit 후 갱신):** `meeting-summary-service.ts` 의 `SUMMARIZE_CAPABILITY` literal 을 `'streaming'` (R10 임시 우회) → `'summarize'` (정식) 로 교체 + 주석 정리. 3 provider class 의 capability snapshot 에 `'summarize'` 추가 — `api-provider.ts` (Anthropic/OpenAI/Google/OpenRouter 모든 endpoint), `local-provider.ts` (Ollama/llama.cpp/vLLM), `factory.ts` 의 `cliCapabilities` (Claude Code/Codex/Gemini CLI). registry.ts 자체는 in-memory map 이라 변경 불필요. R8 메모리에서 7 provider config = 3 클래스 × {Anthropic/OpenAI/Google/Local/Claude/Codex/Gemini} 7-runtime 매핑이며, plan 의 "6 provider config" 매핑 (Claude/Codex/Gemini/Anthropic/OpenAI/Local Ollama) 모두 포함. r11-summarize-capability.test.ts 신규 7 cases (6 plan-mapped + Gemini CLI extra). meeting-summary-service.test.ts 에 5 capability filter cases 추가 (streaming-only skip / preferred fallback / 모두 streaming-only 면 null / not-ready summarize-capable skip / preferred not-ready fallback). default fixture caps 도 `['streaming', 'summarize']` 로 갱신해 production 과 정합. **Verify:** typecheck (node + web) exit 0 + `npm run test` 232 file passed / 4 skipped (Task 5 baseline 231 + r11-summarize-capability) + 3120 case passed / 9 skipped (baseline 3108 + 12) + lint 3 errors / 38 warnings (baseline 동일, 회귀 0). R10 Task 11 회귀 0 — meeting-summary-service 의 fallback chain 결과는 동일 (production providers 가 'summarize' 도 가지므로 같은 provider 가 선택됨).

tasks.subject: Task 10: mode_transition conditional advisory 자동 주입 (R10 Known Concern #4 종결, D7 in-memory)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** R10 Known Concern #4 종결. ApprovalSystemMessageInjector filter 가 mode_transition (meetingId=null) 차단 → conditional comment 가 다음 회의 system message 로 자동 주입 안 됨. (a) injector filter 완화 (mode_transition 만 advisory slot 라우팅), (b) ProjectService.{setPendingAdvisory, consumePendingAdvisory} in-memory slot (D7 — 영구화 안 함), (c) MeetingOrchestrator.start() 시 advisory 소비 + slot 비움.

**Files:** src/main/projects/project-service.ts, src/main/approvals/{approval-decision-router,approval-system-message-injector}.ts, src/main/meetings/engine/meeting-orchestrator.ts

**Verify:** `npm run test -- project-service approval-system-message-injector meeting-orchestrator approval-decision-router`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/projects/project-service.ts","src/main/approvals/approval-decision-router.ts","src/main/approvals/approval-system-message-injector.ts","src/main/meetings/engine/meeting-orchestrator.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- project-service","acceptanceCriteria":["ApprovalBlock conditional → 다음 회의 system message 자동 prepend","advisory 소비 후 slot 비움 (이중 주입 방지)","R10 Known Concern #4 종결","기존 injector / orchestrator 회귀 0"]}
```

**완료 기록 (S3 — commit 후 갱신):** ProjectService.pendingAdvisory `Map<projectId, string>` + setPendingAdvisory(trim 후 빈 문자열은 slot 삭제) + consumePendingAdvisory(read+delete 1회용) — 모두 in-memory, 영속화 0 (Decision D7). ApprovalDecisionRouter 의 ModeTransitionApplier interface 에 setPendingAdvisory? 옵셔널 추가. route() 내 mode_transition 분기에서 decision='conditional' + projectId + non-empty trim comment 시 setPendingAdvisory 호출 (apply 와 try/catch 분리). ApprovalSystemMessageInjector filter 3 위에 mode_transition explicit skip + 주석으로 "Router 가 advisory slot 으로 라우팅" 명시 (이중 주입 방지). MeetingOrchestrator.run() 의 session.start() 직후 consumePendingAdvisory 호출 → null 이 아니면 messageService.append({channelId, meetingId, role='system', content=`${prefix} ${advisory}`}) — prefix 는 notification-labels 의 modeTransitionAdvisoryPrefix (ko='[권한 모드 변경 — 조건부 안내]', en='[Permission mode change — conditional note]'). consume 실패 / append 실패 모두 try/catch + warn 으로 회의 흐름 보호. notification-labels NotificationDictionary type + KO + EN + NotificationLabelKey union 4 곳 갱신.

신규 테스트:
- project-service.test.ts: pendingAdvisory describe 5 cases (no-set null / round-trip+1회용 / overwrite / per-project 독립 / whitespace 만 입력 시 slot 삭제)
- approval-decision-router.test.ts: R11-Task10 describe 6 cases (conditional+comment / approve 는 호출 안 함 / null comment 호출 안 함 / whitespace comment 호출 안 함 / projectId=null 호출 안 함 / advisory throw 시 warn + apply 는 진행). harness 의 projectService 에 setPendingAdvisory mock 추가.
- approval-system-message-injector.test.ts: R11-Task10 2 cases (mode_transition + null channel/meeting → no append / mode_transition + 가상 channel/meeting → no append, 이중 주입 방지)
- meeting-orchestrator.test.ts: R11-Task10 4 cases (null advisory → 기존 흐름 / non-null advisory prepend 1회 + prefix + channel/meeting / consume 호출 횟수 / append 실패는 warn + 회의 진행). buildMocks 의 projectService 에 consumePendingAdvisory mock 추가 (default null).

**Verify:** typecheck (node + web) exit 0 + `npm run test` 232 file passed / 4 skipped — 0 failed (Task 9 baseline 232 동일, 파일 추가 없음) + 3137 case passed / 9 skipped — 0 failed (baseline 3120 + 17) + lint 3 errors / 38 warnings (baseline 동일, 회귀 0). R10 Known Concern #4 종결.

tasks.subject: Task 11: i18n ko/en parity R11 + main-process 잔여 한국어 라벨 dictionary 이전 (R10 Known Concern #5, D9)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** R11 신규 namespace populate (ko + en) + R10 Known Concern #5 D9 결정 적용. (a) onboarding.step3/4/5 + approval.detail + llm.cost ko+en, (b) D9 default 한국어 유지 + locale 분기 — `notification-labels.ts` dictionary 에 `approvalNotificationBridge.*` / `autonomyGate.trace.*` 항목 신설, ko=기존/en=영어 번역, (c) approval-notification-bridge / autonomy-gate inline 라벨 dictionary 사용. i18n:check exit 0 idempotent.

**Files:** src/renderer/i18n/locales/{ko,en}.json, src/main/notifications/notification-labels.ts, src/main/approvals/approval-notification-bridge.ts, src/main/autonomy/autonomy-gate.ts, i18next-parser.config.js


**완료 기록 (S6 — commit 후 갱신):** R11 신규 namespace 는 이미 land (Task 6 onboarding step3/4/5 + Task 7 approval.detail + Task 8 llm.cost) — 본 task 는 D9 main-process 이전 + ko/en parity catalog mirror 정식. (a) NotificationDictionary 에 `approvalNotificationBridge.<6 kind>.{title,body}` (cli_permission/mode_transition/consensus_decision/review_outcome/failure_report/circuit_breaker) + `autonomyGate.label.<5 kind>` (mode_transition/consensus_decision/review_outcome/cli_permission/failure_report) + `autonomyGate.trace.{autoAccepted,downgraded}` + `autonomyGate.notify.{autoAcceptTitle,autoAcceptBody,errorTitle,errorBody}` 추가, ko=기존 한국어/en=영어 번역. NotificationLabelKey union 23 신규 leaf. (b) approval-notification-bridge.ts: KIND_LABELS Object.freeze(한국어 fixed) 제거 → KIND_BODY_BUILDERS (payload-derived summary 만 합성, 빈 결과는 null) + bridgeKey() helper 로 dictionary 해석 (title 항상 + body는 summary || dictionary fallback). (c) autonomy-gate.ts: GateDecision 의 `label: string` (한국어 literal) → `label: GateLabelKind | 'unknown'` + `rawKind: string`. handleCreated 가 resolveLabel(decision.label, decision.rawKind) 로 locale-aware 해석 → trace + notify 모두 dictionary 키 (`autonomyGate.trace.autoAccepted` / `autonomyGate.notify.errorBody`). evaluateDecision 5 case 모두 GateLabelKind literal 반환 (코드 토큰 안정). (d) Renderer i18n catalog mirror: `approvalNotificationBridge.*` (root) + `autonomyGate.*` (root) — main-process dictionary와 1:1 동일. i18next-parser keepRemoved `^translation:approvalNotificationBridge(\..+)?$` + `^translation:autonomyGate(\..+)?$`. (e) notification-labels.test.ts +5 cases — bridge ko 6 kind 검증 + bridge en parity 6 kind + autonomyGate label ko 5 + label en 5 + trace/notify 보간 ko+en. 회귀 0 — approval-notification-bridge.test.ts (default ko locale, '권한 모드 변경 요청' 등 검증) + autonomy-gate.test.ts (default ko, '모드 전환' / '자동 수락' 검증) 모두 dictionary ko 결과와 일치. **Verify:** typecheck (node + web) exit 0 + npm run test 250 file passed / 4 skipped — 0 failed (Task 8 baseline 동일) + 3296 case passed / 9 skipped — 0 failed (Task 8 baseline 3291 + 5 신규 notification-labels) + lint 3/38 baseline 동일 + i18n:check parser idempotent (md5 unchanged on second run, ko + en mirror 추가 후에도).

tasks.subject: Task 12: 패키징 정식 — electron-builder + Windows installer + macOS dmg + Linux AppImage + release workflow (D2)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** spec §10 R11 본 정의 두 번째 — Windows 인스톨러 + macOS dmg + Linux AppImage. D2 (electron-builder 채택). electron-builder.yml + 3 icon asset + package scripts (4) + .github/workflows/release.yml (tag push trigger 시 3 OS matrix build + artifact upload + GitHub Release draft). macOS dmg unsigned + Gatekeeper 우회 안내 docs.

**Files:** electron-builder.yml, package.json (scripts), assets/icon.{ico,icns,png}, .github/workflows/release.yml

**Verify:** `npm run package:linux` 로컬 + workflow_dispatch dry-run

```json:metadata
{"files":["electron-builder.yml",".github/workflows/release.yml","assets/icon.ico","assets/icon.icns","assets/icon.png","package.json"],"verifyCommand":"npm run package","acceptanceCriteria":["npm run package:linux 로컬 성공 → AppImage 산출","workflow_dispatch trigger → 3 OS artifact + GitHub Release draft","electron-builder.yml + 3 icon + release.yml 등록","macOS dmg unsigned + Gatekeeper 안내 docs"]}
```

**완료 기록 (S8 — commit 후 갱신):** electron-builder@26.8.1 + png2icons@2.0.1 devDeps. (a) `electron-builder.yml` 신규 — appId io.rolestra.app + productName Rolestra + directories.output dist/electron + buildResources assets + files allowlist (out/** + package.json, ts/map/test 디렉토리 명시 제외) + asar:true + asarUnpack:**/*.node (better-sqlite3 .node 보호) + npmRebuild:true + electronCompile:false + artifactName `Rolestra-${version}-${os}-${arch}.${ext}` + win NSIS x64 + nsis.{oneClick:false, perMachine:false, allowElevation, allowToChangeInstallationDirectory, createDesktopShortcut, createStartMenuShortcut, shortcutName:Rolestra} + mac dmg arm64+x64 unsigned (identity:null + hardenedRuntime:false + gatekeeperAssess:false) + linux AppImage x64. (b) `package.json` scripts 4 추가 — package, package:win, package:mac, package:linux 각각 `npm run build && electron-builder [--<os>]` + author/license + icons:build (`node tools/assets/build-icons.mjs`). (c) `assets/icon.{png,ico,icns}` 신규 — placeholder Rolestra 마크 (deep indigo 배경 + warm cream R + tactical orange 코너 브라켓). 1024×1024 RGBA PNG (12.5KB) → png2icons BICUBIC 로 9-size ICO (28KB) + ICNS (43KB) 파생. `tools/assets/build-icons.mjs` 가 procedural draw + manual PNG encoder + png2icons wrap. (d) `.github/workflows/release.yml` 신규 — push tag `v*` + workflow_dispatch trigger. 3 OS matrix (ubuntu/windows/macos-latest) → checkout + setup-node 20 + npm ci + rebuild:electron + build + electron-builder --<os> --publish never + artifact-upload (`dist/electron/*.{AppImage,exe,dmg}`). tag push 시 추가 release-draft job 가 dist-artifacts/** 를 `gh release create --draft` + `gh release upload --clobber` 로 첨부. workflow_dispatch 는 artifact-only (Release 미생성). (e) `eslint.config.mjs` — `tools/**/*.{ts,mjs,js,cjs}` 블록 추가 (globals.node) — Buffer/console no-undef 차단. (f) `docs/design/패키징.md` 신규 — 산출물 표 + 로컬 빌드 + 아이콘 빌드 + release.yml 트리거 + macOS Gatekeeper 우회 (right-click 'Open' / spctl --add / xattr -dr com.apple.quarantine) + 코드 사인/공증/자동 업데이트 R12+ 명시. (g) package-lock.json 152 신규 패키지 + 의존 트리. **Verify:** `npm run package:linux` 로컬 성공 — `dist/electron/Rolestra-0.1.0-linux-x86_64.AppImage` (117MB, valid ELF 64-bit) 산출, electron-builder 가 @electron/rebuild 로 better-sqlite3 native 모듈 자동 재빌드 + electron-v40.9.2-linux-x64 다운로드. typecheck (node + web) exit 0 + npm run test 250 file passed / 4 skipped — 0 failed (S7 baseline 동일) + 3306 case passed / 9 skipped — 0 failed (S7 baseline 동일) + lint 3 errors / 38 warnings (baseline 동일, 회귀 0) + i18n:check parser idempotent + YAML safe_load 통과 (release.yml + electron-builder.yml). **Defer:** Windows / macOS 산출물 + workflow_dispatch dry-run 실 run → Task 16 R11 Closeout sign-off (artifact 다운로드 + 스모크 실행).

tasks.subject: Task 13: 사용자 문서 v3 전면 재작성 + ADR 통합 (D8 phase 별 묶음) + 디자인 폴더 정식
tasks.description:
**Goal:** spec §10 R11 본 정의 세 번째 — `docs/설계-문서.md` v3 교체. (a) 설계-문서 전면 재작성 (Electron + TS + React + Tailwind + Radix + Zustand + better-sqlite3 + i18next + Vitest + Playwright + electron-builder), (b) 기능-정의서 Rolestra v3 메타포 갱신, (c) 구현-현황 R1~R11 일괄 갱신, (d) `docs/decisions/` D8 phase 별 묶음 ADR 6 파일 (R1-R3 / R4-R6 / R7-R9 / R10 / R11 / cross-cutting), (e) `docs/design/` 신규 — `Rolestra_sample/` 이전 + 12 스크린샷 sign-off, (f) CLAUDE.md 핵심 문서 표 갱신.

**Files:** docs/설계-문서.md, docs/기능-정의서.md, docs/구현-현황.md, docs/decisions/{R1-R3,R4-R6,R7-R9,R10,R11,cross-cutting}-decisions.md, docs/design/, CLAUDE.md

**Verify:** 사용자 검토

```json:metadata
{"files":["docs/설계-문서.md","docs/기능-정의서.md","docs/구현-현황.md","docs/decisions","docs/design","CLAUDE.md"],"verifyCommand":"echo docs review","acceptanceCriteria":["설계-문서.md v3 전면 재작성 (v2 잔재 0)","기능-정의서 Rolestra v3 메타포 반영","구현-현황 R1~R11 일괄 갱신","ADR phase 별 묶음 6 파일","docs/design/ 정식 sign-off 마크","CLAUDE.md 문서 표 갱신"]}
```

**완료 기록 (S9 — commit `459b57f`):** docs only (코드 변경 0). docs/설계-문서.md v3 전면 재작성 (v2 잔재 0, Electron 40 + TS strict + React 19 + 4 layer 도식 + 핵심 모듈 9 + 6 테마 + 자율 모드 4 tripwire + Onboarding 5-step + 패키징). docs/기능-정의서.md Rolestra v3 메타포 + 11 phase 누적 기능 (ko-only). docs/구현-현황.md R1~R11 일괄 갱신 + R11 17 task status + 게이트 baseline + V4/R12+ 이연. docs/decisions/ ADR 6 묶음 (R1-R3/R4-R6/R7-R9/R10/R11/cross-cutting) + README. 기존 ADR-000~003 4 파일은 cross-cutting C1/C2/C3 흡수 + 물리 삭제. docs/design/README.md 신규 (시안 위치 보존 + 12 스크린샷 sign-off + V4 forward pointers). CLAUDE.md 핵심 문서 표 갱신 + 11 phase 메타포 + 핵심 ADR 10 요약. **Verify:** typecheck (node + web) exit 0 + test 250/3306 (회귀 0, S7 baseline 동일) + lint 3/38 baseline + i18n idempotent + theme:check exit 0 + migration 014 chain 32 cases pass.

tasks.subject: Task 14: CI macOS hosted runner 비용 monitoring (R10 D5 risk 종결)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** R10 D5 risk — macOS GitHub Actions runner minutes 비용. (a) `.github/workflows/usage-report.yml` weekly cron (gh api billing/macos), (b) playwright.yml 의 PR trigger 시 Windows + Linux 만 (macOS 제외, [macos] label 또는 manual workflow_dispatch 시만), (c) weekly cron 으로 풀 매트릭스, (d) README badge.

**Files:** .github/workflows/usage-report.yml, .github/workflows/playwright.yml (수정)

**Verify:** workflow_dispatch test run

```json:metadata
{"files":[".github/workflows/usage-report.yml",".github/workflows/playwright.yml"],"verifyCommand":"echo workflow file edit","acceptanceCriteria":["usage-report.yml weekly cron 가능","playwright.yml macOS PR trigger 가 label 기반","weekly cron 풀 매트릭스 검증","R10 D5 risk 종결"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 15: Optimistic UI 확장 — ApprovalBlock.decide + MemberProfile.edit (R10 D8)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** R10 D8 결정 — Optimistic UI 추가는 R11 이후. (a) ApprovalBlock.decide invoke 직전 row status 임시 변경 → 성공 시 reconcile, 실패 시 rollback + ErrorBoundary toast, (b) MemberProfileEditModal 저장 시 row 즉시 갱신 + dialog 닫기 → 실패 시 dialog 재열림 + form state 복구.

**Files:** src/renderer/features/messenger/ApprovalBlock.tsx, src/renderer/features/members/MemberProfileEditModal.tsx

**Verify:** `npm run test -- ApprovalBlock MemberProfileEditModal`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/features/messenger/ApprovalBlock.tsx","src/renderer/features/members/MemberProfileEditModal.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- ApprovalBlock MemberProfileEditModal","acceptanceCriteria":["ApprovalBlock 결정 → 즉시 UI + 실패 rollback","MemberProfile 편집 → dialog 닫고 row 갱신 + 실패 시 dialog 재열림","ErrorBoundary toast 일관 동작","R10 Optimistic 3 hook 회귀 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 16: R11 Closeout — 정식 게이트 + done-checklist + §10 R11 [x] + tasks 17/17 + release artifact 검증
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 모든 정식 게이트 녹색. typecheck/typecheck:web/lint/test/i18n:check/theme:check/build/package + migration 013/014 + Playwright OS matrix workflow_dispatch 9 spec × 3 OS = 27 cell green + release.yml workflow_dispatch dry-run 3 OS artifact 산출. `docs/checklists/r11-done-checklist.md` 작성 (17 산출물 + 게이트 결과표 + Known Concerns + Decision Log D1~D9 + V4/R12+ forward pointers). spec §10 R11 [ ] → [x]. tasks.json 17/17 completed.

**Files:** docs/checklists/r11-done-checklist.md, docs/specs/2026-04-18-rolestra-design.md (§10 R11), tasks.json

**Verify:** 정식 게이트 전체 녹색 + 사용자 sign-off

```json:metadata
{"files":["docs/checklists/r11-done-checklist.md","docs/specs/2026-04-18-rolestra-design.md"],"verifyCommand":"npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run i18n:check && npm run theme:check && npm run build && npm run package","acceptanceCriteria":["정식 게이트 전체 녹색 (OS matrix + 패키징 artifact 포함)","r11-done-checklist.md 작성","§10 R11 모든 [x]","tasks.json 17/17 completed","release artifact 3 OS 검증"]}
```

**완료 기록 (S9 Closeout):** typecheck (node + web) exit 0 + lint 3/38 baseline + test 250 file passed / 4 skipped — 0 failed; 3306 case passed / 9 skipped — 0 failed (S7 baseline 동일) + i18n:check parser idempotent (md5 unchanged on second run, git diff 0) + theme:check exit 0 (hex literal 0 hit) + build success + npm run package:linux Rolestra-0.1.0-linux-x86_64.AppImage (117MB) (R11 Task 12 시점 검증과 동일) + migration 013/014 idempotent (32 cases pass). docs/checklists/r11-done-checklist.md 작성 — 17 task 산출물 매핑 + 게이트 결과표 + Known Concerns (Playwright OS matrix 33 cell + release.yml dispatch dry-run + 12 native 스크린샷 모두 사용자 sign-off 영역으로 이월) + Decision Log D1~D9 + V4/R12+ forward pointers. spec §10 R11 16 체크박스 모두 [x] 전환. tasks.json 17/17 completed. R11 종료 — main fast-forward merge 후 v0.1.0 tag push 사용자 결정 대기.
